extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against each entity: all “By” rows were excluded. Criminal proceedings against the company, directors, promoters and subsidiaries total 0 + 0 + 0 + 1 = 1; statutory/regulatory proceedings against them total 1 + 1 + 0 + 2 = 4; tax proceedings counted only for the company and subsidiaries total 6 + 22 = 28, excluding director and promoter personal tax matters. The aggregate quantified amount against the company and subsidiaries is the stated against-row total of ₹282.19 million + ₹1,759.09 million = ₹2,041.28 million, including tax and excluding promoter/director and “By” matters; at ₹ million, this converts to ₹204.128 crore by dividing by 10. Contingent liabilities use the explicitly stated consolidated “Total” of ₹366.15 million as of June 30, 2023, converted to ₹36.615 crore, rather than summing line items. The most recent full-fiscal company-wide customer concentration is Fiscal 2023, using revenue from operations as the denominator: top five 51.64% and top ten 58.12%; source monetary tables use ₹ million.
